recommendations.title: Blacklight
recommendations.overview: Travis Block is a shadowy Government agent who specializes in removing operatives whose covers have been exposed. He then has to uncover a deadly conspiracy within his own ranks that reaches the highest echelons of power.

recommendations.title: A Family Man
recommendations.overview: Dane Jensen is a driven, Chicago-based headhunter, working at a cut-throat job placement firm. When his boss pits Dane against Lynn Vogel, Dane's equally driven but polar-opposite rival at the firm, in a battle for control over the company. When his

recommendations.title: Stander
recommendations.overview: The life and career of Andre Stander, a South African police officer turned bank robber.

recommendations.title: Harry Potter and the Deathly Hallows: Part 1
recommendations.overview: Harry, Ron and Hermione walk away from their last year at Hogwarts to find and destroy the remaining Horcruxes, putting an end to Voldemort's bid for immortality. But with Harry's beloved Dumbledore dead and Voldemort's unscrupulous Death Eaters on t

recommendations.title: Carjacked
recommendations.overview: A single mom and her child are carjacked by a bank robber who has no intention of letting them go.

recommendations.title: Wheelman
recommendations.overview: A getaway driver for a bank robbery realizes he has been double crossed and races to find out who betrayed him.

recommendations.title: Extortion
recommendations.overview: A doctor desperately tries to save his wife and their 5 year old son after their vacation in the Bahamas takes an unexpected turn.

recommendations.title: Stardust

recommendations.title: Flag Day
recommendations.overview: A father lives a double life as a counterfeiter, bank robber and con man in order to provide for his daughter.

recommendations.title: Tiger House
recommendations.overview: A young gymnast battles a group of bank robbers at the home of her boyfriend.
